titleStmt.title: SII 10.138: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 138. (A.R. No. 664 of 1920.) ON A PILLAR LYING IN THE COMPOUND OF THE TEMPLE OF MALLĒŚVARA, PERAVALI, TENALI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1078.

summary.p: States that one Kommama built the temple of Mādhavadēva in the village of Peruvali and that her son made a gift of land for naivēdyam to the said deity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīramaṇuṁḍu śau¨ryyaguṇōddā
ruṁḍu goṁkavibhu māma da¨rppita
ripusaṁhāruṁḍu dhīruṁ ḍa
naṁ dagu mārayapaṁḍaṁḍu gī
¨rttimaṁḍanuṁḍu mahini . [1 .*] Anaṁ dagu
daṁḍēśu priyāṁgana gommama vibu
dhamitragaṇaparivāraṁbuna ke
llanu hridayānaṁdanakāri yanaṁga
negaḍe dhāruṇi miṁdanu . [2 .*] ghanuṁ
ḍu niḍumrāni kommayakunu līlāvatiyu
dhai¨ryyaguṇavati yani pempuna negaḍina mallā
ṁbikakunu suta yanaṁ baragi dhai¨ryyaguṇa
saṁstutitōnu . [3 .*]
vananidhivēṣṭitāvanilōnaṁ gala
yagrahāraṁbulaku maṇihāralī
la . mānaina peruvali mādha
vadēvara kettiṁcce guḍi bhakti yesaṁ
gaṁ gommamāṁbika tatpūnuṁ ḍarucōḍa
daṁḍēśuṁ ḍaṭṭevunaku nivēdyamuna ka¨rtti
tō rājitaṁ bagu nēraḍlaceṟvu nāgnēya
kunaṁ gaḍu nāyatamuga . 0 baragaṁ bāda
khya niruvuṭṭi bhūmi ravīṁdutārakamuga ni
cceṁ draiśatāgrajanmasamiti yanuma
taṁbuna śakābdamu libhādridigmita
muna velaya . [4 .*] gaḍvamaḍiprēṁpāvada
kṣiṇaṁbunaṁ buṭṭeṁḍu bhūmi dāniṁ bū
jāri mādhavabhaṭlu dēvaraku gosavi ni
vēdyaṁbuna kicciri .
Digital edition of SII 10.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
